issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT] Fixing footer spacing
issues.body:
**Current Behavior**
The spacing in the footer is not optimal.

**Proposed Enhancement**
I will fix the spacing.

**Expected Outcome**
Better spacing will help the user navigate better.

issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT] The inactive members tag has an incorrect color applied.
issues.body: **Current Behavior** Currently the inactive tag for members has green colour which is the same as the active tag. **Proposed Enhancement** I will change it to a more suitable colour. **Expected Outcome** The user will be easily able to differentiate between the inactive and active members of the club.

issues.title: [ENHANCEMENT] Nebula Link in Header is not highlighted like before
issues.body: **Current Behavior** Right now the Nebula Tag in Header is just like others and is not highlighted like before. Image: **Proposed Enhancement** I will change the color of text so that it is highlighted again. **Expected Outcome** User can easily distinguish between normal links and Nebula.
